extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Adam and twin brother Simon escaped in closing kilometers to take 1-2, with Adam edging Simon in finale while Pogačar's group lost 20 seconds at 1km to go.
tactical_patterns: Yates twins established winning gap in final kilometers despite Jumbo-Visma tempo-setting, suggesting team coordination trumped raw firepower on technical finish.
Pogačar's UAE train lost 17 seconds with 1 mile remaining despite numeric advantage, revealing difficulty controlling hilly technical finales.
Early KOM competition triggered aggressive racing from inexperienced riders like Coquard, fragmenting field before decisive late moves.

rider_signals.YATES Adam: positive: Outsprinted twin brother Simon for stage win and yellow despite Simon doing more pacemaking work in breakaway
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Made decisive late move with twin Adam but accepted domestique role despite being on rival team
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: neutral: Finished third at 20 seconds but celebrated unaware of gap, suggesting UAE team communication issues on technical finish
rider_signals.COQUARD Bryan: positive: Inexperienced Cofidis rider attacked early Cat-3 KOM aggressively, taking 2 points and fragmenting field despite burning matches
rider_signals.GOUGEARD Alexis: positive: Responded to Coquard's early KOM attack and helped split field, showing AG2R aggression from opening kilometers
